SpTU 5, 311 [loan of dates][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

[...] x 1(AŠ) GUR x [...]

(o 1) [...] 1 kurru [...]. [They will give] a palm-leaf basket, palm heart and fibre of the date palm. Anu-[..., son of PN], descendant of Ekur-zakir is guarantor for the payment of those dates.

o 2'2'

⸢tu-ḫal-lu⸣ lib₃-bi u man-⸢ga⸣-[ga ...]

o 3'3'

⸢pu-ut⸣ eSUR ša₂ ZU₂.LUM.MA MU-MEŠ md60—[...]

o 4'4'

[...] x x ⸢A⸣ ša₂ mE₂.KUR—za-kir na-ši

Bottom
b.e. 1b.e. 1

un!-<qu>

(b.e. 1) 1. Seal

(impression of seal impression traces)
Reverse
r 1r 1

lu₂mu-kin₇ md60—NUMUN—MU DUMU ša₂

(r 1) Witnesses: Anu-zer-iddin, son of Anu-ab-uṣur, Anu-uballiṭ, son of PN, Ina-qibit-Anu, son of Ittannu. Bel-uṣur, the scribe, son of Nabu-naṣir. At Uruk, month Ululu, 24th day, 10th year, Seleucus the king.

r 22

md60—⸢AD?—URI₃?⸣ md60—DINiṭ

r 33

DUMU ša₂ [...]-x mina—qi₂-bit—d60

r 44

DUMU ša₂ mit-tan-nu

r 55

mdEN—URI₃ lu₂UMBISAG A-šu₂ mdNA₃—PAP UNUGki

r 66

itiKIN U₄ 24-KAM₂ MU 1-KAM₂ msi-lu-ku LUGAL

Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

un-<qu> un-qu

(t.e. 1) Seal. Seal.
